scripts.dev:mp-weixin: cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=. uni dev -p mp-weixin --outDir unpackage/dist/dev/mp-weixin
scripts.build:h5: cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=. uni build -p h5 --outDir unpackage/dist/build/h5
scripts.build:mp-weixin: cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=. uni build -p mp-weixin --outDir unpackage/dist/build/mp-weixin && node scripts/copy-tab-icons.mjs
